content: filippo.io/age v1.3.1 (2025-12-28). BSD-3-Clause, stable v1+. Core API: GenerateX25519Identity() returns *X25519Identity; identity.String() returns AGE-SECRET-KEY-... string; identity.Recipient() returns *X25519Recipient; ParseX25519Identity(s string) to round-trip; Encrypt(dst io.Writer, recipients...Recipient) returns io.WriteCloser; Decrypt(src io.Reader, identities...Identity) returns io.Reader. ParseIdentities(f io.Reader) and ParseRecipients(f io.Reader) for file-based key loading. CVE GHSA-32gq-x56h-299c affects only the plugin API (path traversal via plugin names), NOT the X25519 encrypt/decrypt path. Fixed in v1.2.1; v1.3.1 is clean. DebateOS uses X25519 only, no plugin system.
